title: Review: vault backend simplification
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — no new public surface, no security exposure, one documented limitation (serde zeroization). The diff is a net simplification.
Confidence: 5% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: vaultrs internal behavior when an empty map is passed to kv2::set (might fail at the API layer rather than succeeding silently). Would raise confidence if: live Vault integration test covers put-with-empty-json edge case. Everything else is straightforward synchronous logic.
